properties.name: grails.views.default.codec
properties.description: Fallback default for `grails.views.gsp.codecs.expression`, `scriptlet`, `taglib` and `staticparts` when those are not set. Options: `none`, `html`, `base64`.

properties.name: grails.views.gsp.encoding
properties.description: The file encoding for GSP source files.

properties.name: grails.views.gsp.htmlcodec
properties.description: Selects the HTML escaping style for GSP output. When not set (or when the value does not start with `xml` or equal (ignoring case) `xhtml`), a legacy HTML4-compatible encoder is used. Set to `xml` or `xhtml` to use the XML-safe encoder.

properties.name: grails.views.gsp.codecs.expression
properties.description: The codec applied to GSP ${} expressions.

properties.name: grails.views.gsp.codecs.scriptlet
properties.description: The codec applied to GSP <% %> scriptlet output.

properties.name: grails.views.gsp.codecs.taglib
properties.description: The codec applied to tag library output.

properties.name: grails.views.gsp.codecs.staticparts
properties.description: The codec applied to static HTML parts of GSP pages.

properties.name: grails.views.gsp.layout.preprocess
properties.description: Whether GSP layout preprocessing is enabled. Disabling allows Grails to parse rendered HTML but slows rendering.

properties.name: grails.views.enable.jsessionid
properties.description: Whether to include the jsessionid in rendered links.

properties.name: grails.views.filteringCodecForContentType
properties.description: Map of content types to encoding codecs.

properties.name: grails.gsp.disable.caching.resources
properties.description: Whether to disable GSP resource caching.

properties.name: grails.gsp.enable.reload
properties.description: Whether to enable GSP reloading in production.

properties.name: grails.gsp.view.dir
properties.description: Custom directory for GSP view resolution.
